title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week focused on improving platform stability and Salesforce integration reliability. We enhanced our Salesforce deployment process to better handle complex workflows and fixed detection of State/Country picklist configurations that could cause setup issues. Several backend improvements ensure smoother operations across all connected systems.

entries.headline: Better Salesforce State/Country picklist detection and deployment reliability
details: OpsPal now automatically detects when Salesforce orgs use State/Country picklists, preventing configuration conflicts
Improved deployment process validation to catch permission issues before they cause failures
Enhanced reliability for complex Salesforce setup workflows
